title: Buttery Tender Raw Friendly Ukrainian Bhuna Feather Blade Beef Stir-fry
description: A weeknight-friendly, raw-friendly Ukrainian dish featuring tender feather blade beef in a buttery bhuna sauce.
instructions: Prepare the Feather Blade Beef by slicing it into thin strips.
Slice ginger thinly and finely chop green onions.
Dice garlic very small for ease in cooking.
Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add sliced beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add diced ginger and finely chopped green onions to the pan and stir for another minute.
Stir-fry minced garlic with salt for about 10 seconds.
Season with fish sauce and soy sauce, stirring well to combine with beef.
Continue cooking until tender and flavors are evenly distributed, approximately 5-7 minutes more.
Garnish with additional green onions if desired before serving.
